name: The Good Son
description:
“There’s no need to see me as a hero.”

[ fighter returns home ]

.

To be in the military means that you are willing to sacrifice your life and leave everything behind. Because there are no guarantees that you’ll come back alive. All you and your family and friends can do is hope that you do. So home becomes the most precious thing for a soldier. But for Karros, the recently returned fighter, home just gained an entirely different meaning.

[Art by @raferafe]

Summary:

Karros Halfdinger is a 26 year old fox, he’s been serving in the military as an aviator fighter for 7 years (he was drafted when he was 19), and he’s finally given the chance to return home. He may be happy, but he’s more lost and distant than glad, as he realized that the dream and the personal life differ in many ways.

[week 9]
creator: shokokokok
